untranslatable_reason: Signal requires explicit 'value area' definition and measurement of 'divergence magnitude' which are not standard technical indicators in the provided toolkit. Value area is a market profile concept not directly computable from OHLCV data without additional parameters (AUTHOR_SILENT). Proxy conditions using pivot support/resistance (s1/r1) and prior bar extremes substituted, but this does not capture the original value area consolidation logic.
translation_notes: Used pivot support (s1) and resistance (r1) as proxies for value area boundaries. Entry conditions model breakout below consolidation (long at lower boundary) and breakout above (short at upper boundary) by comparing close to previous bar extremes and pivot levels. Exit conditions reverse when price returns within the range. Original signal's 'divergence magnitude' and 'confirmation_periods' parameters remain undefined per AUTHOR_SILENT designation.
